title: Avery Dennison: The Easy Money Has Been Made, But Further Upside Potential Exists
text: Avery Dennison has done well to increase its sales and profits over the past couple of quarters. Management also now has a more favorable view of the 2022 fiscal year, but it's also true that the easy money has been made.

title: Here's Why Its Worth Retaining Avery Dennison (AVY) Stock Now
text: Avery Dennison (AVY) is worth retaining in your portfolio owing to the strong demand for labeling technology and high investment in high-value products despite inflated material costs.
